title: Mintcraft Horizons
description: MintCraft Horizons is a Minecraft modpack that enhances exploration with new dungeons, minerals, and performance optimizations. It supports online play, Virtual Reality, and runs on Fabric 1.21.1.
body: MintCraft Horizons: Echoes of the Depths v1.0 is a custom Minecraft modpack designed to enhance the exploration experience by adding new dungeons, minerals, and weapons to the game. Optimized for performance across Windows, Linux, and Mac, this modpack provides an immersive gameplay experience while maintaining smooth performance. It supports private LAN worlds online through Essentials and includes Virtual Reality capabilities through Vivecraft (VVR), bringing Minecraft to a new level of immersion. The modpack runs on Fabric 1.21.1, with a focus on expanding world exploration, offering new challenges, and improving overall gameplay efficiency.
